name: libtext-tabulardisplay-perl
title: libtext-tabulardisplay-perl
summary: Perl module to display text as a formatted table
description:
Perl module to display text as a formatted table
Text::TabularDisplay is a Perl module that simplifies displaying textual data
in a table. It provides column-based output identical to the display of query
results in the MySQL text monitor.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libtext-tabulardisplay-perl because Perl module to display text as a formatted table.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libtext-tabulardisplay-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libtext-tabulardisplay-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libtext-tabulardisplay-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
